raw_consumer_statement:
Latter half XX/XX/XXXX : I get a first XXXX XXXX store credit card statement for paying towards a single purchase, made without my authorization, for flooring in the amount of {$5800.00}. Particulars : 1. Purchase date XX/XX/XXXX on a XXXX XXXX store XXXX card for account ending in XXXX. 
2. Place of purchase : XXXX NY XXXX XXXX, on XXXX XXXX. I have not purchased flooring in any quantity at the XXXX XXXX XXXX or any XXXX XXXX in over ten years. I have not engaged any staff there by inquiring about flooring, its pickup or delivery, or installation. 
3. I never applied for this card. 
4. I have never seen this card, though it is possible my deceased wife ( XX/XX/XXXX ) got it in my name. But I have never gotten a statement on it by mail or electronically. It is a one-off fraudulent purchase - to my knowledge. 
5. The first statement I have gotten on this card was in XX/XX/XXXX. 
6. I called XXXX XXXX Customer Service in latter XXXX to report the impersonation and fraud done in my name. 
7. They opened a case, closed the account balance ( I now guess in pending fashion ) and then closed the case without finding in my favor. They divulged almost nothing, leading me to believe the effort was perfunctory.

8. I have since received another account notice to make payment. 
9. I called again ( ~XXXX  XXXX, XXXX ) and, after they resisted and said only that signatures match, they reopened the case. 
10. I do not know even how to call XXXX and provide any information on the card number or its account application, etc. 
11. This was a clever impersonation and fraud and I doubt the item was delivered and installed by people associated with XXXX XXXX. Pickup by customer arrangement seems the most likely. 
12. Current case claim # is XXXX. 
13. XXXX XXXX agent is welcome to come to my house and look around.
